pk_tuples.notes: Single dose 100mg oral lorlatinib; Cmax 595.5 ng/mL (37% CV), AUCinf 8236 ng·h/mL (25% CV), median Tmax 1.2h; mean CL/F 11 L/h (35% CV); from Table 96 Study B7461001; t1/2=24h

pk_tuples.dose_original: 100 mg orally once daily steady state
pk_tuples.notes: Steady-state 100 mg QD in NSCLC patients; Cmax 577 ng/mL (42% CV), AUC0-24h 5650 ng·h/mL (39% CV), median Tmax 2h; mean CL/F 18 L/h (39% CV) - autoinduction; AUC also reported as 5121 (30% CV) in Table 97/98
Single IV 50 mg dose in healthy subjects (Study B7461007); Vss = 305L (28% CV); CL_iv 9.713 L/h; absolute bioavailability 81% (90% CI 75.7, 86.2)
